news.title:
Bajaj Auto reported March sales at 4.45 lakh units, near CNBC estimate of 4.49 lakh.
Exports rose 21% to 1.79 lakh units but missed monthly run rate; stock fell 1.8% to ₹8,740.
news.summary:
Bajaj Auto reported March sales at 4.45 lakh units, near CNBC estimate of 4.49 lakh.
Exports rose 21% to 1.79 lakh units but missed monthly run rate; stock fell 1.8% to ₹8,740.

news.title:
Bajaj Auto saw an NSE block trade worth Rs. 68.2 crore for 76,049 shares.
The shares were traded at Rs. 8,965.50 each during the transaction.
news.summary:
Bajaj Auto saw an NSE block trade worth Rs. 68.2 crore for 76,049 shares.
The shares were traded at Rs. 8,965.50 each during the transaction.

news.title:
Bajaj Auto's P/E ratio at 27.4 is below the industry's 30.7.
Despite price declines, Bajaj Auto outperforms Sensex long-term, showing resilience.
news.summary:
Bajaj Auto's P/E ratio at 27.4 is below the industry's 30.7.
Despite price declines, Bajaj Auto outperforms Sensex long-term, showing resilience.

news.title:
Bajaj Auto posts Q3 revenue of INR 152.2bn (+19% y/y) with EBITDA margin at 20.8% (+60bp).
Electric vehicles contributed 25% of domestic revenue; exports crossed 500k units after 15 quarters.
news.summary:
Bajaj Auto posts Q3 revenue of INR 152.2bn (+19% y/y) with EBITDA margin at 20.8% (+60bp).
Electric vehicles contributed 25% of domestic revenue; exports crossed 500k units after 15 quarters.

news.title:
Bharti Airtel invests $1B in Nxtra for AI/cloud; Hindustan Copper plans ₹470-cr copper plant.
IREDA signs ECB deal worth ¥28B; Bajaj Auto's AAA rating reaffirmed by CARE Ratings.
news.summary:
Bharti Airtel invests $1B in Nxtra for AI/cloud; Hindustan Copper plans ₹470-cr copper plant.
IREDA signs ECB deal worth ¥28B; Bajaj Auto's AAA rating reaffirmed by CARE Ratings.

news.title:
CARE Ratings reaffirmed CARE AAA (Stable) rating for Bajaj Auto Credit's Rs. 10,000 crore long-term bank facilities.
The credit rating update was disclosed by Bajaj Auto on March 31, 2026, under Regulation 30 compliance.
news.summary:
CARE Ratings reaffirmed CARE AAA (Stable) rating for Bajaj Auto Credit's Rs. 10,000 crore long-term bank facilities.
The credit rating update was disclosed by Bajaj Auto on March 31, 2026, under Regulation 30 compliance.

news.title:
Bajaj Auto stock drops over 10% from Feb 2026 highs, staying above 200-DMA.
The stock's correction suggests potential buying opportunity as it holds key support.
news.summary:
Bajaj Auto stock drops over 10% from Feb 2026 highs, staying above 200-DMA.

news.title:
Experts analyzed stocks: Jio Financial Services, IRCTC, L&T, Suzlon, Wipro, and Bajaj Auto on NDTV's 'Ask Profit'.
Buy: L&T, Suzlon; Hold: Jio Financial, IRCTC, Bajaj Auto; Avoid: Wipro. Analysts provided targets and stop-loss points.

news.title:
Bajaj Mobility AG achieves EUR 1B revenue in 2025, selling 209,704 units.
H2 2025 sales rose 60% vs H1; net profit EUR 590M, equity ratio at 24.3%.
news.summary:
Bajaj Mobility AG achieves EUR 1B revenue in 2025, selling 209,704 units.
H2 2025 sales rose 60% vs H1; net profit EUR 590M, equity ratio at 24.3%.

news.title:
CLSA cuts target prices for major auto stocks like Tata Motors, M&M, Hero MotoCorp, citing crude price risks.
Preferred picks include M&M, Bajaj Auto, TVS, Ashok Leyland due to stronger execution amid earnings risks.
news.summary:
CLSA cuts target prices for major auto stocks like Tata Motors, M&M, Hero MotoCorp, citing crude price risks.
Preferred picks include M&M, Bajaj Auto, TVS, Ashok Leyland due to stronger execution amid earnings risks.

news.title:
Accuracap Prime Fund and officials settled Sebi's AIF norms case for ₹21.75 lakh.
The fund breached corpus rules and overallocated to Bajaj Auto, violating AIF norms.
news.summary:
Accuracap Prime Fund and officials settled Sebi's AIF norms case for ₹21.75 lakh.
The fund breached corpus rules and overallocated to Bajaj Auto, violating AIF norms.

news.title:
Bajaj Auto may shift EV expansion out of Maharashtra over subsidy and permit issues.
The company is exploring Pantnagar and other states with clearer policy support.
news.summary:
Bajaj Auto may shift EV expansion out of Maharashtra over subsidy and permit issues.
The company is exploring Pantnagar and other states with clearer policy support.

news.title:
Bajaj Auto considers Pantnagar plant for Chetak EV production amid Maharashtra incentives uncertainty.
Maharashtra owes Bajaj Auto ₹60 crore in subsidies; Pune produces Chetak EVs, Aurangabad three-wheelers.
news.summary:
Bajaj Auto considers Pantnagar plant for Chetak EV production amid Maharashtra incentives uncertainty.
Maharashtra owes Bajaj Auto ₹60 crore in subsidies; Pune produces Chetak EVs, Aurangabad three-wheelers.

news.title: Bajaj Auto shares experience a decline on Wednesday.
news.summary: Bajaj Auto shares experience a decline on Wednesday.

news.title:
Bajaj Auto shares fell 1.8% on Wednesday, with UBS attributing the decline to Maharashtra's temporary halt on new auto rickshaw permits.
UBS notes Bajaj Auto's 87% market share in ICE three-wheelers in Maharashtra and maintains a 'sell' rating with a target of ₹9,015.
news.summary:
Bajaj Auto shares fell 1.8% on Wednesday, with UBS attributing the decline to Maharashtra's temporary halt on new auto rickshaw permits.
UBS notes Bajaj Auto's 87% market share in ICE three-wheelers in Maharashtra and maintains a 'sell' rating with a target of ₹9,015.

news.title:
Maharashtra paused new auto rickshaw permits due to 3-wheeler saturation.
State contributes 15% of 3-wheeler sales; ICE 3-wheelers have 30% margin.
news.summary:
Maharashtra paused new auto rickshaw permits due to 3-wheeler saturation.
State contributes 15% of 3-wheeler sales; ICE 3-wheelers have 30% margin.

news.title:
UBS maintains Sell on Bajaj Auto with target price Rs 9,015, citing dependency on Maharashtra for ICE 3W profit.
ICE 3Ws contribute 30% margins, making Bajaj Auto's profitability sensitive to regional economic shifts.
news.summary:
UBS maintains Sell on Bajaj Auto with target price Rs 9,015, citing dependency on Maharashtra for ICE 3W profit.
ICE 3Ws contribute 30% margins, making Bajaj Auto's profitability sensitive to regional economic shifts.

news.title:
Bajaj Auto Credit secures ICRA AAA ratings for Rs 7,750 crore facilities, affirming strong financials.
Bajaj Auto shares traded at Rs 9812.65 on BSE, hitting Rs 9883.25 high and Rs 9695.95 low intraday.
news.summary:
Bajaj Auto Credit secures ICRA AAA ratings for Rs 7,750 crore facilities, affirming strong financials.
Bajaj Auto shares traded at Rs 9812.65 on BSE, hitting Rs 9883.25 high and Rs 9695.95 low intraday.

news.title:
Bajaj Auto's Baih BV repays €480M loan, ends Citigroup & Standard Chartered contracts.
Partial payments made to JPMorgan and DBS by Bajaj Auto's Baih BV.
news.summary:

Jio Finance invests ₹147.45 crore in Allianz Jio Reinsurance JV, with funds for operations.
